Mirrors  >  Home  >  MPE Home  >  Th. List  >  resfunexg Structured version   Visualization version   GIF version
Theorem resfunexg 7199
Description: The restriction of a function to a set exists. Compare Proposition 6.17 of [TakeutiZaring] p. 28. (Contributed by NM, 7-Apr-1995.) (Revised by Mario Carneiro, 22-Jun-2013.)
Assertion
Ref Expression
resfunexg ⊢ ((Fun 𝐴 ∧ 𝐵 ∈ 𝐶) → (𝐴 ↾ 𝐵) ∈ V)
Proof of Theorem resfunexg
Dummy variable 𝑥 is distinct from all other variables.
StepHypRef Expression
1 funres 6563 . . . . . . 7 ⊢ (Fun 𝐴 → Fun (𝐴 ↾ 𝐵))
21adantr 484 . . . . . 6 ⊢ ((Fun 𝐴 ∧ 𝐵 ∈ 𝐶) → Fun (𝐴 ↾ 𝐵))
32funfnd 6552 . . . . 5 ⊢ ((Fun 𝐴 ∧ 𝐵 ∈ 𝐶) → (𝐴 ↾ 𝐵) Fn dom (𝐴 ↾ 𝐵))
4 dffn5 6925 . . . . 5 ⊢ ((𝐴 ↾ 𝐵) Fn dom (𝐴 ↾ 𝐵) ↔ (𝐴 ↾ 𝐵) = (𝑥 ∈ dom (𝐴 ↾ 𝐵) ↦ ((𝐴 ↾ 𝐵)‘𝑥)))
53, 4sylib 220 . . . 4 ⊢ ((Fun 𝐴 ∧ 𝐵 ∈ 𝐶) → (𝐴 ↾ 𝐵) = (𝑥 ∈ dom (𝐴 ↾ 𝐵) ↦ ((𝐴 ↾ 𝐵)‘𝑥)))
6 fvex 6880 . . . . 5 ⊢ ((𝐴 ↾ 𝐵)‘𝑥) ∈ V
76fnasrn 7127 . . . 4 ⊢ (𝑥 ∈ dom (𝐴 ↾ 𝐵) ↦ ((𝐴 ↾ 𝐵)‘𝑥)) = ran (𝑥 ∈ dom (𝐴 ↾ 𝐵) ↦ ⟨𝑥, ((𝐴 ↾ 𝐵)‘𝑥)⟩)
85, 7eqtrdi 2813 . . 3 ⊢ ((Fun 𝐴 ∧ 𝐵 ∈ 𝐶) → (𝐴 ↾ 𝐵) = ran (𝑥 ∈ dom (𝐴 ↾ 𝐵) ↦ ⟨𝑥, ((𝐴 ↾ 𝐵)‘𝑥)⟩))
9 opex 5431 . . . . . 6 ⊢ ⟨𝑥, ((𝐴 ↾ 𝐵)‘𝑥)⟩ ∈ V
10 eqid 2762 . . . . . 6 ⊢ (𝑥 ∈ dom (𝐴 ↾ 𝐵) ↦ ⟨𝑥, ((𝐴 ↾ 𝐵)‘𝑥)⟩) = (𝑥 ∈ dom (𝐴 ↾ 𝐵) ↦ ⟨𝑥, ((𝐴 ↾ 𝐵)‘𝑥)⟩)
119, 10dmmpti 6665 . . . . 5 ⊢ dom (𝑥 ∈ dom (𝐴 ↾ 𝐵) ↦ ⟨𝑥, ((𝐴 ↾ 𝐵)‘𝑥)⟩) = dom (𝐴 ↾ 𝐵)
1211imaeq2i 6047 . . . 4 ⊢ ((𝑥 ∈ dom (𝐴 ↾ 𝐵) ↦ ⟨𝑥, ((𝐴 ↾ 𝐵)‘𝑥)⟩) “ dom (𝑥 ∈ dom (𝐴 ↾ 𝐵) ↦ ⟨𝑥, ((𝐴 ↾ 𝐵)‘𝑥)⟩)) = ((𝑥 ∈ dom (𝐴 ↾ 𝐵) ↦ ⟨𝑥, ((𝐴 ↾ 𝐵)‘𝑥)⟩) “ dom (𝐴 ↾ 𝐵))
13 imadmrn 6059 . . . 4 ⊢ ((𝑥 ∈ dom (𝐴 ↾ 𝐵) ↦ ⟨𝑥, ((𝐴 ↾ 𝐵)‘𝑥)⟩) “ dom (𝑥 ∈ dom (𝐴 ↾ 𝐵) ↦ ⟨𝑥, ((𝐴 ↾ 𝐵)‘𝑥)⟩)) = ran (𝑥 ∈ dom (𝐴 ↾ 𝐵) ↦ ⟨𝑥, ((𝐴 ↾ 𝐵)‘𝑥)⟩)
1412, 13eqtr3i 2787 . . 3 ⊢ ((𝑥 ∈ dom (𝐴 ↾ 𝐵) ↦ ⟨𝑥, ((𝐴 ↾ 𝐵)‘𝑥)⟩) “ dom (𝐴 ↾ 𝐵)) = ran (𝑥 ∈ dom (𝐴 ↾ 𝐵) ↦ ⟨𝑥, ((𝐴 ↾ 𝐵)‘𝑥)⟩)
158, 14eqtr4di 2815 . 2 ⊢ ((Fun 𝐴 ∧ 𝐵 ∈ 𝐶) → (𝐴 ↾ 𝐵) = ((𝑥 ∈ dom (𝐴 ↾ 𝐵) ↦ ⟨𝑥, ((𝐴 ↾ 𝐵)‘𝑥)⟩) “ dom (𝐴 ↾ 𝐵)))
16 funmpt 6559 . . 3 ⊢ Fun (𝑥 ∈ dom (𝐴 ↾ 𝐵) ↦ ⟨𝑥, ((𝐴 ↾ 𝐵)‘𝑥)⟩)
17 dmresexg 6000 . . . 4 ⊢ (𝐵 ∈ 𝐶 → dom (𝐴 ↾ 𝐵) ∈ V)
1817adantl 485 . . 3 ⊢ ((Fun 𝐴 ∧ 𝐵 ∈ 𝐶) → dom (𝐴 ↾ 𝐵) ∈ V)
19 funimaexg 6608 . . 3 ⊢ ((Fun (𝑥 ∈ dom (𝐴 ↾ 𝐵) ↦ ⟨𝑥, ((𝐴 ↾ 𝐵)‘𝑥)⟩) ∧ dom (𝐴 ↾ 𝐵) ∈ V) → ((𝑥 ∈ dom (𝐴 ↾ 𝐵) ↦ ⟨𝑥, ((𝐴 ↾ 𝐵)‘𝑥)⟩) “ dom (𝐴 ↾ 𝐵)) ∈ V)
2016, 18, 19sylancr 596 . 2 ⊢ ((Fun 𝐴 ∧ 𝐵 ∈ 𝐶) → ((𝑥 ∈ dom (𝐴 ↾ 𝐵) ↦ ⟨𝑥, ((𝐴 ↾ 𝐵)‘𝑥)⟩) “ dom (𝐴 ↾ 𝐵)) ∈ V)
2115, 20eqeltrd 2862 1 ⊢ ((Fun 𝐴 ∧ 𝐵 ∈ 𝐶) → (𝐴 ↾ 𝐵) ∈ V)
